validation.redactionBoundary: synthetic review-result validator fixtures only; no real validation receipt, private packet, account, operator, credential, provider payload, order payload, token, app key, app secret, execution, fill, or order confirmation content

promotionRules: future review result can be recorded only after owner-assisted receipt review
review result cannot record the private receipt path or raw values
review result success still does not import permission evidence
review result success still does not enable provider calls, order adapter implementation, runtime routes, UI, DB writes, orders, or live trading
